messages.content: Fix the SQL injection vulnerability in user_service.py (PHOENIX-1234). Marco Vitale flagged this.

content.content:
"""User management service for ProjectPhoenix.

Author: Marco Vitale
Team: AcmeCorp Platform Engineering
"""

def get_user_by_email(db_conn, email: str):
    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '{email}'"  # SQL INJECTION!
    result = db_conn.execute(query)
    ...

def create_admin_user(db_conn):
    admin = User(
        id=0,
        email="marco.vitale@acmecorp.com",
        name="Marco Vitale",
        role="admin",
    )
    ...
